readme_claim_mappings.allowed_only_when: Palisade decision is allow under current repository evidence and existing README sobriety checks also pass.
readme_claim_mappings.current_state_qualifier_rule: Current-state descriptions of provider login, callback recognition, protected-route admission, and bounded save/load persistence are classifications only; they are not production maturity assertions.

readme_claim_mappings.allowed_only_when: Palisade decision is allow under current repository evidence.
readme_claim_mappings.current_state_qualifier_rule: Verified authentication path language may pass only when it remains bounded to provider initiation, callback/session recognition, protected-shell admission, or tested protected-shell save/load state.

readme_claim_mappings.allowed_only_when: Palisade decision is allow under current repository evidence.
readme_claim_mappings.current_state_qualifier_rule: Bounded save/load and browser-level account separation may be stated only as bounded evidence, not tenant maturity.

readme_claim_mappings.allowed_only_when: Palisade decision is allow under current repository evidence.
readme_claim_mappings.current_state_qualifier_rule: Repository-held planning and external substrate evidence do not become broad production authorization maturity.

readme_claim_mappings.allowed_only_when: Palisade decision is allow under current repository evidence.
readme_claim_mappings.current_state_qualifier_rule: The README may describe the required path as a threshold and may state it remains unclaimable; it may not state the path is operational.

readme_claim_mappings.allowed_only_when: Runtime enforcement status is available and Palisade decision is allow under current repository evidence.
readme_claim_mappings.current_state_qualifier_rule: Repository-owned policy artifact language may pass; runtime enforcement language is prohibited while runtime_enforcement.current_status is unavailable.

readme_claim_mappings.allowed_only_when: Palisade decision is allow under current repository evidence.
readme_claim_mappings.current_state_qualifier_rule: Pinned NEXUS source and local compatibility records may be classified as repository evidence, not public runtime execution.

readme_claim_mappings.allowed_only_when: Palisade decision is allow under current repository evidence.
readme_claim_mappings.current_state_qualifier_rule: No-live-AI and no-model-execution boundary statements are bounded current-state classifications.

readme_claim_mappings.allowed_only_when: Palisade decision is allow under current repository evidence.
readme_claim_mappings.current_state_qualifier_rule: Future threshold language may pass only when it states operational release authority is not current.

readme_claim_mappings.allowed_only_when: Palisade decision is allow under current repository evidence.
readme_claim_mappings.current_state_qualifier_rule: Repository-local evidence, deterministic traces, and evidence contracts do not complete operational evidence or a production audit ledger.

readme_claim_mappings.allowed_only_when: Palisade decision is allow under current repository evidence.
readme_claim_mappings.current_state_qualifier_rule: Contracts, stubs, local adapters, and pinned-source evidence may pass as repository artifacts only.

readme_claim_mappings.allowed_only_when: Palisade decision is allow under current repository evidence.
readme_claim_mappings.current_state_qualifier_rule: Specification-only Weave language may pass only when it states Weave remains non-operational.

readme_claim_patterns: \bOperator review has authorized production threshold transition\b
readme_claim_mappings.allowed_only_when: Palisade decision is allow under explicit claim-specific Operator authorization evidence.
readme_claim_mappings.current_state_qualifier_rule: Operator-review routing may be described as a review requirement; it may not authorize README capability advancement by itself.

classification_patterns: \bstatic, GitHub Pages deployed, browser-side, deterministic, scenario-driven, non-persistent public artifact\b
\bstatic, preview, non-production, reserved, and boundary language\b
readme_claim_mappings.allowed_only_when: Classification is bounded by README context and does not imply production, operational, public runtime, or deployed enforcement capability.
readme_claim_mappings.current_state_qualifier_rule: Current-state qualifiers are accepted only as classification support and must not disguise unavailable operational capability.

readme_claim_mappings.allowed_only_when: Referenced repository artifact exists at the mapped source path and the wording does not claim runtime enforcement or operational capability.
readme_claim_mappings.current_state_qualifier_rule: Artifact existence may pass as repository truth; it does not prove Palisade runtime enforcement, policy service deployment, or release authority.

fail_closed_behavior: Fail validation if the README consumer contract, Palisade policy, input schema, or decision schema is missing or malformed.
Fail validation if any governed README claim class lacks a Palisade claim ID mapping.
Fail validation if a mapped Palisade claim ID lacks a rule in the policy artifact.
Fail validation if a required policy input or decision field is absent.
Fail validation if current repository evidence sources are missing, contradictory, or hypothetical fixture-only.
Fail validation if a Palisade-governed README capability claim appears and the current policy decision is not allow.
Fail validation if allow lacks complete current evidence, traceable current-state basis, or compatible runtime-enforcement status.
no_overclaim_behavior: Validator consumption is not runtime enforcement.
The existence of a Palisade policy artifact is not proof of deployed enforcement.

README language must not claim production workspace maturity, public NEXUS runtime, model API execution, operational release authority, runtime enforcement, deployed Conduit/Vault integration, or Weave orchestration without Palisade allow under current repository evidence.
Bounded current-state classifications may pass when repository evidence supports them and they do not imply unavailable operational capability.

operator_review_handling.requires_operator_review: Not README claim permission by itself.
operator_review_handling.authorization_required: Explicit claim-specific Operator authorization evidence must exist and the policy must permit review-based advancement before any Operator-review-gated capability claim may pass.

runtime_enforcement_status_handling.runtime_enforcement_unavailable: Blocks any README claim of deployed or operational Palisade enforcement.
runtime_enforcement_status_handling.unavailable: Confirms validator-only consumption and cannot be represented as a deployed policy membrane.
runtime_enforcement_status_handling.available: May be accepted only with complete current repository evidence and a Palisade allow decision.

hypothetical_fixture_boundary.current_repository_evidence: Must come from synchronized repository evidence records, not hypothetical complete-evidence fixtures.
hypothetical_fixture_boundary.validator_behavior: fail if hypothetical allow fixtures are used to authorize README current-state claims.

forbidden_capability_claims: server-side authorization or RLS maturity exists
non_claims: This consumer contract does not implement runtime enforcement.
This consumer contract does not wire Palisade into public runtime behavior.
This consumer contract does not modify README prose or public copy.
This consumer contract does not implement Conduit execution, Vault/NEXUS execution, model API execution, Weave orchestration, operational release authority, or a public policy API.
Palisade remains not a deployed enforcement membrane.
next_integration_boundary: After README current-state truth validation consumes Palisade policy decisions, the next consumer should be selected from the integration-readiness map based on current repository evidence without runtime enforcement claims.
